title: Mildly Bitter Filipino Lamb Ginataang Bilo Bilo
description: A traditional Filipino dish with a twist, featuring lamb leg and crispy bilo bilo, in a rich and creamy coconut milk sauce with a hint of bitterness, this dairy-free-friendly recipe is perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Rehydrate the dehydrated lamb leg by soaking it in water for 30 minutes.
In a large pan, heat the coconut milk over medium heat.
Add the diced onion, garlic, and ginger to the pan and saute until the onion is translucent.
Add the rehydrated lamb leg to the pan and cook until it is browned on all sides.
Add the bitter melon, bilo bilo, salt, and pepper to the pan and stir well.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the pan from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the ginataang bilo bilo hot, garnished with crispy bilo bilo on top.
